---
title: "05 — Caracterización por OXI"
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd

oxi = params.oxi_col
tons = params.toneladas_col

# Mineral tratado por OXI
if oxi in df.columns and tons in df.columns:
    treated = df.groupby(oxi)[tons].sum().sort_values(ascending=False).to_frame("toneladas_tratadas")
else:
    treated = pd.DataFrame({"warning":["No se encontraron columnas oxi/toneladas según params. Ajusta _quarto.yml"]})

treated
```

## Distribución temporal del mix OXI

```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

datecol = params.date_col_bateas
if oxi in df.columns and datecol in df.columns and tons in df.columns:
    tmp = df.dropna(subset=[datecol]).copy()
    tmp["month"] = tmp[datecol].dt.to_period("M").dt.to_timestamp()
    mix = tmp.groupby(["month", oxi])[tons].sum().reset_index()
    pivot = mix.pivot(index="month", columns=oxi, values=tons).fillna(0)
    plt.figure()
    pivot.plot(kind="area")
    plt.title("Toneladas tratadas por OXI — por mes")
    plt.xlabel("Mes")
    plt.ylabel("t")
    plt.tight_layout()
```

## Perfil metalúrgico por OXI (si existen columnas)

```{python}
from src.qa import numeric_summary

profile_cols = ["c_total","carbonatos","p80", params.recovery_col]
if oxi in df.columns:
    profiles = []
    for k, g in df.groupby(oxi):
        s = numeric_summary(g, [c for c in profile_cols if c in g.columns])
        s.insert(0, oxi, k)
        profiles.append(s)
    profiles = pd.concat(profiles, ignore_index=True) if profiles else pd.DataFrame()
else:
    profiles = pd.DataFrame({"warning":["No existe columna OXI en df."]})

profiles.head(50)
```
